content:
*Greetings everyone! (ㅅ´ ˘ `)*

   I am Aikaterina and it is a pleasure to meet everyone here (even with a bit of delay since I have been fairly troubled with countless matters in real life).

   I am an English (EN) translator, proofreader, and editor for this project.
   ^ Although English is my second language, I have a pretty strong academic background in it. I hold a BA degree in English Literature and Language (and my native language as well), with a BA Thesis written in the field of English Victorian Literature about Sherlock Holmes and the novel “A Study in Scarlet”. 
   Currently, I am pursuing an MA degree in Applied Linguistics (EFL), which I hope will help me become an English Literature professor. (˶ˆ꒳ˆ˵)🤞🏻

   In addition, I am a both short and long prose, and poetry writer, actively involved in beta reading and proofreading novels on various Discord servers, tutoring students and pupils in English through private classes, and many more, which all have given me some experience in pedagogy, language learning and teaching, and academic writing/work.

   My enthusiasm for Morimens has been through the roof ever since the beginning of May, 2025, due to its absolutely stunning artistic direction with character designs and background art, storytelling, and the storyline itself, and I am beyond committed to supporting its growth and development through both playing the game and working for it alongside other peers.

   *Nota bene*: I truly feel like Morimens is just the type of game that captivates, inspires, and bring people together (like we all have gathered here in this “side” project), and I’m excited to see in which direction our collective work will go from now on. 🤗♥️
